violations.text: The door to the outside, located near the walk-in, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The door to the outside, located by the walk-in, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was unplugged and shall not be used until washed rinsed, and sanitized. Ice was disposed of. Slicing cleaning guide provided to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. 3-bay sink must be used to sanitize until the dish machine is serviced. Establishment to test dish machine to ensure it is adequately sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

Burgers are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

The ceiling in the part of the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. (Small leak away from food contact surfaces) New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
